summary: All new features verified in update mode: 1) Employee Portal 'Recent Shifts' shows current pay period shifts or previous if none in current - PASSED. 2) Admin 'View Portal' modal shows same pay period logic - PASSED. 3) Password Management is now collapsible under Team Management - PASSED. 4) Commission split field on payment records - already tested, still working. Total: 31 frontend E2E tests passed, 9 backend API tests passed.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features working correctly: 1) Employee Portal 'Recent Shifts' section dynamically shows 'Current Pay Period Shifts (Mar 16 - Mar 29)' when shifts exist in current period, or 'Previous Pay Period Shifts (Mar 2 - Mar 15)' when no current period shifts. 2) Admin Employee Portal View modal (opened via 'View Portal' button in All Employees table) shows same pay period logic for shifts display. 3) Password Management section under Team Management is now collapsible - click the toggle to expand/collapse, shows Employees and Consignors tabs when expanded. 4) Commission split field on payment records continues to work (50/50 placeholder, editable to any value like 60/40).

recent_shifts_pay_period.location: Employee Dashboard & Admin Employee Portal View modal
tests: Employee Dashboard shows pay period label in Recent Shifts heading
Shows Current Pay Period Shifts when shifts exist in current period
Shows Previous Pay Period Shifts with date range when no current period shifts
Current Pay Period summary shows correct date range
Admin Portal modal shows Recent Shifts with pay period label
Admin Portal modal shows Previous Pay Period when no current period shifts
Admin Portal modal shows Current Pay Period summary
Admin Portal modal can be closed

password_management_collapsible.location: Admin Dashboard > Team Management > Password Management
tests: Password Management section is visible under Team Management
Password Management is collapsible - toggle shows/hides content
Employees and Consignors tabs visible when expanded
Section collapses when toggle is clicked again

commission_split_field.location: Payroll & Payments > Payment Records > Consignment tab
tests: Commission split input field visible with placeholder 50/50
Field is editable - can change to 60/40, 70/30 etc
Backend updates commission_split on existing record
Backend retrieves commission_split from stored records
